findings.description: Section content is under 50 characters (~48 chars): "汎用データフォーマット機能の概要・詳細は :ref:`data_format` を参照すること。"
findings.source_evidence: Source intro contains only a brief purpose statement and a cross-reference to :ref:`data_format`, so the short content is structurally justified, but the section still falls below the 50-character threshold.
